snippet.title: Good Fortune - Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Good Fortune is Aziz Ansari's directorial debut, starring Seth Rogen, Keanu Reeves, Keke Palmer, and Sandra Oh, where he'll be bringing comedy back to cinemas.

In the official Good Fortune trailer, you'll see Reeves play Ansari's incompetent guardian angel, and in an attempt to show him that life is worth living, swaps Ansari's life with his tech-bro friend, played by Rogen. 

#GoodFortune in cinemas October 17
